diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I forgot my password and I need to reset it. Can you help?
[Agent] Sure, I can help with that. What's your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Let me pull that up. I see the account — Kaito Nakamura, Asia server, Adventure Rank 60. What new password would you like to set?
[Caller] Can you make it Summer2026Teyvat?
[Agent] Got it. I'm resetting the password now. Done — the new password is Summer2026Teyvat. You should be able to log in immediately.
[Caller] Oh wow, that was fast. Thanks!
[Agent] You're welcome. Anything else?
[Caller] Actually, while I have you — can you tell me what my last top-up was? I want to check my records.
[Agent] Sure. Your last top-up was 99 dollars and 99 cents on April 18, 2026, order ID ORD202604180001.
[Caller] Perfect, thanks. That's all.
[Agent] Have a great day!
